title: diplotaxis saxatilis subsp. humilis
intro: Diplotaxis saxatilis subsp. humilis, also known as wall rocket or wild rocket, is a sub-species of the wild rocket plant, which belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It is a perennial plant with edible leaves and is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Diplotaxis saxatilis subsp. humilis include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as potentially aiding in the prevention of certain cancers due to its high content of glucosinolates. Diplotaxis saxatilis subsp. humilis can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be consumed raw in salads or as a garnish.
